# israel-rent-data

High-density index for agents working in this repository.

## Root Inventory
- `rent_benchmarks.csv` — canonical fact table
- `geography_reference.csv` — canonical geography dimension
- `locality_crosswalk.csv` — locality-only compatibility artifact
- `manifest.json` — release metadata and provenance summary
- `README.md` — dataset landing page
- `SCHEMA.md` — file and column dictionary
- `METHODOLOGY.md` — source handling and normalization logic
- `QA.md` — release checks and checklist
- `DATA-LICENSE.md` / `SOURCES.md` / `ATTRIBUTION.md` / `LIMITATIONS.md` — rights and interpretation docs

## Repo Tree
```text
.
├── .github/
│   ├── pr-agent-context-template.md
│   └── workflows/
│       ├── ci.yml
│       └── pr-agent-context-refresh.yml
├── docs/
│   └── patch/
│       ├── 01_overview_and_execution_plan.md
│       ├── 02_repo_patch_spec.md
│       ├── 03_schema_and_data_model_redesign.md
│       ├── 04_rights_licensing_and_provenance_plan.md
│       ├── 05_documentation_pack_spec.md
│       └── 06_data_expansion_and_release_checklist.md
├── scripts/
│   └── validate_release.py
├── tests/
│   └── test_validate_release.py
├── AGENTS.md
├── llms.txt
├── .agent-plan.md
├── pyproject.toml
├── manifest.json
├── rent_benchmarks.csv
├── geography_reference.csv
└── locality_crosswalk.csv
```

## Critical Schemas
- Fact schema: `rent_benchmarks.csv`, documented in `SCHEMA.md`
- Geography schema: `geography_reference.csv`, documented in `SCHEMA.md`
- Release metadata schema: `manifest.json`, described in `README.md` and `QA.md`

## Validation Entry Points
- Release validation CLI: `scripts/validate_release.py`
- Automated tests: `tests/test_validate_release.py`
- CI workflow and coverage artifact producer: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- PR refresh workflow for managed context comments: `.github/workflows/pr-agent-context-refresh.yml`

## Agent Context Files
- Static constraints: `AGENTS.md`
- Current dynamic state: `.agent-plan.md`
- Long-form planning docs preserved under `docs/patch/`
